The '''Reigats''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with grayish, mottled skin and dark blue hair, eyelids, and lips. They were generally a species of loners whose yearly "breeding drive" was probably all that kept them from becoming extinct.<ref name="rebops">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>

The Reigats were sometimes very quick to anger. This was sometimes termed "Reigat Rage".
